subject: A tall humanoid figure with long pale hair kneels over a prone wounded figure in a cave, channeling a glowing healing light from one hand
description: A tall, muscular humanoid figure with long pale hair stands or crouches over a prone figure lying on the ground in a rocky cave setting. The standing figure's right hand emits a soft warm glow directed at the prone person, clearly a healing act. The standing figure is dressed in dark clothing with an open chest, projecting a stern but focused expression. The cave walls frame the scene with rough gray stone. The prone figure is partially visible at the lower left. The lighting is mostly ambient with the healing glow as a secondary source point. The scene is intimate and quiet despite the implied violence of the wound being treated.
foreground: Healer channeling glowing light toward prone figure
emotion: focused determination — the healer is intent, the wounded figure is still
